applicability_notes: In-place elementwise less-than-or-equal comparison. Mutates the first tensor; downstream consumers of the original first tensor must be rewired to the mutated value. Validated with compare_equal in unit tests (exact 0/1 mask match). Supports tensor-tensor and tensor-scalar forms.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.le_(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b); constraints: {'in_place': True, 'output_aliases_input': 'input_tensor_a', 'second_operand': 'tensor of same shape or scalar', 'broadcasting': 'second operand may be a python scalar', 'output_dtype_note': 'result written into input_tensor_a as 0/1 mask values'}
